description_long: This is a life-sized adult human figure with a realistic anatomical build, depicted in a neutral standing pose with arms slightly outstretched. The figure is wearing a two-piece swimsuit, consisting of a bikini top with thin straps and matching bikini bottoms. The skin surface is smooth and unblemished, with no visible body hair or facial features beyond basic contours. The feet are bare, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The head is bald, with no visible hair, hats, or accessories. The overall appearance is that of a generic adult female pedestrian, suitable for urban or public environments.
description: A bald adult female figure in a two-piece swimsuit, standing upright with arms slightly out. The figure is barefoot and has a smooth, featureless skin surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and front of the swimsuit, with arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, chest, and the side straps of the swimsuit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and the back of the swimsuit, with arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, torso, and side of the swimsuit.
